name: Comfort Food Confessional
tagline: Rank the dishes you'd eat on a bad day — no judgment, mostly.

items.text: Stovetop mac and cheese eaten straight from the pot at 11pm
Grilled cheese with tomato soup — the rainy-day trinity
A mountain of mashed potatoes with a crater of gravy
Instant ramen upgraded with an egg and whatever's in the fridge
Chicken noodle soup that steams up the whole kitchen
Leftover fried rice with too much soy sauce and zero regrets
A PB&J cut diagonally because geometry matters
Cereal for dinner — the bowl is bigger than your head
Frozen pizza with the slightly burnt edges you pretend to hate
Meatloaf with ketchup stripes like a edible barcode
A pot pie where the crust is the whole point
A sheet pan of tater tots shared with nobody
Rice pudding with cinnamon — nursery food for adults
Toast with too much butter and a light dusting of salt
A deep bowl of chili with shredded cheese that never fully melts
Corner piece brownie from the pan — still warm, still gooey
